videos.headline: Tanook Hines makes incredible grab on USC trick play
videos.description: Tanook Hines somehow comes down with the football on a pass from Makai Lemon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tanook Hines makes incredible grab on USC trick play) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Malik Benson returns punt 85 yards to the house
videos.description: Malik Benson weaves his way through the defense for a 85-yard punt return touchdown to put Oregon on top.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Malik Benson returns punt 85 yards to the house) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon LB Bryce Boettcher scores a touchdown
videos.description: Oregon LB Bryce Boettcher takes the direct snap and powers in for the 1-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon LB Bryce Boettcher scores a touchdown) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Whittington seals the game for Oregon with rushing TD
videos.description: Noah Whittington takes the handoff nine yards into the end zone to ice the game for the Ducks.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Noah Whittington seals the game for Oregon with rushing TD) 2025/11/22 ESHEET
